heading: Obligations or securities of United States
label: 471 Obligations or securities of United States
text: Whoever, with intent to defraud, falsely makes, forges, counterfeits, or alters any obligation or other security of the United States, shall be fined under this title or imprisoned not more than 20 years, or both.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 18, U.S.C., 1940 ed., § 262 (, ).Mar. 4, 1909, ch. 321, § 14835 Stat. 1115Mandatory punishment provision was rephrased in the alternative.Changes in phraseology were made.
Amendments2001— substituted “20 years” for “fifteen years”.Pub. L. 107–561994— substituted “fined under this title” for “fined not more than $5,000”.Pub. L. 103–322
